name_en: 🆕 Top-tier Original M82959 Blue Denim Wallet Series Victorine Wallet Ams Enveluff style compact Viktoline Wallet. Reinterpreting the Louis Vuitton iconic Monogram pattern with jacquard denim and a stone-washed effect. Features two flat pockets and a spacious design with many card slots. Includes a press stud type locking device for secure storage. Dimensions: 12 x 9.5 x 1.5 cm.
